summary: Made two surgical exit tweaks to tighten the handoff into chapter 13's breakfast aftermath. The opening already used a distinct construction from the visible neighboring opening, so no opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Adjusted the final-night forecast to point more cleanly toward the next chapter's morning notices and financial pressure.
Changed the closing line from generic returning noise to the apartment's hum so the blackout recovery hands off directly into chapter 13.
